headline: B of A Securities Maintains Buy on Federal Realty Investment, Raises Price Target to $131
summary: B of A Securities  analyst Jeffrey Spector   maintains Federal Realty Investment (NYSE:FRT) with a Buy and raises the price target from $128 to $131.
